canonicalChoiceReason: User-designated keep slug. Published v1 already in library. Broadest scope ('without refrigeration') naturally encompasses the power-outage-specific and preservation-specific guides.

fieldDecisions.source: Rewritten for clarity. Original 'Food Safety Without Refrigeration' retained but expanded slightly to 'Food Safety Without Refrigeration' — already concise and action-oriented.
Changed from 'scenario' to 'action' — the merged guide now has step-by-step actions and functions as an action card, not just a scenario reference.
fieldDecisions.note: food-safety-power-outage-action was action layer; food-preservation was reference layer. The merged guide's primary purpose is actionable guidance.

fieldDecisions.source: Changed from 'scenario_guide' to 'action_card' to match the action layer and step-by-step content.
Combined the comprehensive framing from food-preservation v2 with the actionable focus of food-safety-power-outage-action.
food-safety-power-outage-action had the most specific and actionable quick answer with concrete time windows.
Combined food-preservation v2 (thermometer monitoring) with food-safety-power-outage-action (door-closed tracking).
Cooler transfer guidance from food-safety-power-outage-action, supplemented by food-preservation v2's cooler detail.
7 steps from food-safety-power-outage-action formed the base. Added cooler temperature monitoring detail from food-preservation v2. Deduplicated to 8 final steps.
fieldDecisions.note: food-safety-no-fridge v1 had 0 steps. food-preservation v2 had 0 steps (reference_guide). food-safety-power-outage-action had 7 steps.

fieldDecisions.source: 7 from food-preservation v2 + 3 from food-safety-power-outage-action + 2 from food-safety-no-fridge v1, deduplicated to 9.
5 from food-preservation v2 + 3 from food-safety-power-outage-action, deduplicated to 6.
5 from food-preservation v2 + 3 from food-safety-power-outage-action + 2 from food-safety-no-fridge v1, deduplicated to 7.
8 from food-preservation v2 + 3 from food-safety-power-outage-action, deduplicated to 8.
5 from food-preservation v2 + 3 from food-safety-power-outage-action + 1 from food-safety-no-fridge v1, deduplicated to 5.

7 from food-preservation v2 + 4 from food-safety-power-outage-action + 1 from food-safety-no-fridge v1. Deduplicated by organization+topic to 7 (food-preservation v2 had the most comprehensive set with real URLs; food-safety-power-outage-action refs were subsets).
fieldDecisions.note: food-safety-no-fridge v1 had 1 CDC ref; covered by food-preservation v2's CDC entry.

fieldDecisions.source: Both food-preservation v2 and food-safety-power-outage-action are 'strong'. Merged guide is 'strong'.
Union of all three guides' tags, deduplicated.

conflicts.resolution: Use 'action' — the merged guide has step-by-step actions and serves as the primary action card for this topic. The reference content from food-preservation is incorporated into the warnings, tips, and supporting text.
Use 'action_card' — consistent with action layer and step-by-step format.

conflicts.valueA: Dry ice can cause severe frostbite — never touch it with bare hands and never place it in direct contact with food.
conflicts.resolution: Included from food-preservation — important safety warning not present in the action card.

conflicts.valueA: If outdoor temperature is above 90°F, perishable food left out is unsafe after just 1 hour.
conflicts.resolution: Included from food-preservation — relevant 1-hour rule for hot weather scenarios.

archiveCandidateWarnings: food-preservation v2 has alternativeToGuideSlugs pointing to 'food-safety-no-fridge' — this link becomes moot since food-preservation is being archived into food-safety-no-fridge.
food-safety-power-outage-action has alternativeToGuideSlugs pointing to 'refrigerator-safety-during-outages' — this relationship should be carried forward in the merged guide's constraint metadata.
No other guides in the library reference food-preservation or food-safety-power-outage-action as alternatives — safe to archive both.
